description: Asset migration manifest for Slice 18 Task 9. Each entry maps a yesid.dev static/images/* path to its target Directus folder + metadata. Consumed by scripts/migrate-assets.ts to bulk-upload via the Directus SDK. Excludes the stray ChromeSetup.exe (not an asset; flagged as a separate cleanup task).

folders.about: About-page assets — headshot, interests, logos, polaroids (consumed by src/routes/about).
folders.brand: Site-chrome assets — hero art, Montreal-metro illustrations, global brand imagery.
folders.projects: Project cover images — portfolio cards + detail-page heroes.

assets.title: Headshot — Yesid
assets.description: Portrait photograph of Yesid; used as the primary author image on the /about page and across site-chrome.

assets.title: Interests — anime
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in anime; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — data visualization
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in data visualization; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — food
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in food; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — open source
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in open-source contribution; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.description: Anonymized company logo placeholder in the /about page career-history strip.

assets.description: Decorative polaroid photograph; used in the /about page polaroid strip.

assets.description: Decorative polaroid photograph; used in the /about page polaroid strip.

assets.title: Hero station art (PNG)
assets.description: Raster fallback of the home-page hero illustration; the WebP sibling is the primary format.

assets.title: Hero station art (WebP)
assets.description: Primary home-page hero illustration depicting a stylized train station platform.

assets.title: Metro network reference diagram
assets.description: Reference SVG of the full metro-system map used as source material for the site's service-stations metaphor.

assets.title: Montreal street map (photo)
assets.description: Photograph of a Montreal street map; used as decorative imagery on the /about page.

assets.title: Montreal metro map (source)
assets.description: Raw SVG of the Montreal metro system — unprocessed source file for the rendered montreal-metro.svg asset.

assets.title: Montreal metro map (rendered)
assets.description: Stylized Montreal metro map rendered for site use; the visual anchor for the services metaphor.

assets.title: yesid.dev — cover screenshot
assets.description: Cover screenshot of the yesid.dev site; used on the /projects listing + the project-detail page for the self-referential case study.
